case_title: XIN YU WU VS. WILBERT BATISTE

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WU, XIN YU AS TO DEFENDANT BATISTE, WILBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, XIN YU ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE:$35.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, XIN YU AS TO DEFENDANT BATISTE, WILBERT

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. ANTHONY TAM--CANTONESE INTERPRETER WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
